summary: Stage 10-14 Honest Audit Testing Complete. 22/23 backend tests passed (1 skipped). All critical fixes verified: AdminUser guard on match endpoints (non-admin gets 403), finalize blocks unresolved questions, username in top_3, asyncio.get_running_loop(), cache eviction. Frontend UI verified: Home, My Contests, Leaderboard, Admin Panel all working.

stage_7_9_fixes.my_contests_pagination: PASS - filter BEFORE paginate works correctly
stage_7_9_fixes.my_contests_status_filter: PASS - status=open returns only open contests
stage_7_9_fixes.batch_db_queries: PASS - contest_map and match_map used (no N+1)

stage_10_fixes.user_answers_404: PASS - returns 404 for invalid user (modal error state)

stage_11_fixes.asyncio_get_running_loop: PASS - uses get_running_loop() not deprecated get_event_loop()
stage_11_fixes.cricbuzz_endpoint: PASS - graceful fallback when network blocked

frontend_ui.home_page: PASS - Live matches, upcoming matches displayed
frontend_ui.leaderboard_page: PASS - Your Position card, leaderboard entries
frontend_ui.user_answer_modal: PASS - opens on click, shows user info
frontend_ui.admin_resolve_tab: PASS - shows contests with Resolve buttons

critical_code_review_comments: AdminUser dependency correctly applied to ALL 6 match write endpoints (create_match, update_match_status, update_live_score, assign_template, sync_cricbuzz_matches, sync_match_score)
Contest finalize correctly checks resolved_count < len(qids) and returns 400 with clear error message
top_3_users in finalize response correctly fetches username from users collection
get_my_leaderboard_position has proper null check: if entry.get('submission_time') before using tiebreaker
CricketDataService uses asyncio.get_running_loop() (not deprecated get_event_loop()) in all 3 async methods
Cache eviction implemented: MAX_CACHE_ENTRIES=100, _evict_stale_cache() called after each cache write
my-contests endpoint filters by status BEFORE pagination (line 454: if contest_status and contest.get('status') != contest_status: continue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 10-14 Honest Audit fixes all verified. Key verifications: 1) Non-admin users get 403 on ALL match write endpoints (critical security fix). 2) Contest finalize blocks if questions unresolved. 3) Finalize response includes username in top_3. 4) Leaderboard handles null submission_time. 5) CricketDataService uses modern asyncio API with cache eviction. 6) my-contests filters before pagination. All regression tests pass - login, home, wallet, contests work correctly.

mocked_apis_list: Cricbuzz scraper returns connected:false in container environment (network blocked)

verification_details.AdminUser_guard: All 6 match write endpoints (POST /matches, PUT /matches/{id}/status, PUT /matches/{id}/live-score, POST /matches/{id}/assign-template, POST /matches/live/sync, POST /matches/{id}/sync-score) use AdminUser dependency. Non-admin gets 403 'Admin access required'.
verification_details.finalize_blocks_unresolved: finalize_contest checks resolved_count vs len(qids) and returns HTTPException 400 with detail 'Cannot finalize: X/Y questions still unresolved'
verification_details.username_in_top3: finalize_contest fetches user from db.users.find_one and adds username to top_3_users list
verification_details.null_submission_time: get_my_leaderboard_position has 'if entry.get("submission_time"):' check before using submission_time in tiebreaker query
verification_details.asyncio_fix: All 3 async methods (fetch_live_matches, fetch_live_score, fetch_scorecard) use asyncio.get_running_loop() instead of deprecated get_event_loop()
verification_details.cache_eviction: MAX_CACHE_ENTRIES=100 class constant, _evict_stale_cache() removes expired entries when cache exceeds limit
